case_title: GILCREASE, JOY vs. DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 860 GEARY STREET, APT 401, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY SEIDENFELD, MARC RUSSELL
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $130.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE OCT-27-1994, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $130.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $525.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY SERVED AUG-18-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILCREASE, JOY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBOLT, THOMAS RAYMOND AKA THOMAS DEBOLT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: [PREMISES RESTORED 14-SEP-94 THRU CLERK JUDGMENT 01-SEP-94] $467.50 RENT, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $597.50, LEASE FORFEITED
